basic_details.job_title: DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical SupervisorRecruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Lohardaga (DHS Lohardaga) Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Notification 2026 has been released on the official website lohardaga.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 Years Maximum Age: 40 Years Age Relaxation: ST: 40 years (50 years for PwD); Ex-Servicemen: 5 years relaxation in respective category

qualification.details: Graduate preferably from biology stream and in case the candidate with desired qualification is not available, a graduate with science in class XII shall be considered. Experience candidates in health related programme shall be given preference. The candidates should have a valid two wheelers driving license.

selection_process: Written Test Merit List based on Written Test and Educational Qualifications
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://lohardaga.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Recruitment 2026 - Overview
DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Lohardaga Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate preferably from biology stream and in case the candidate with desired qualification is not available, a graduate with science in class XII shall be considered. Experience candidates in health related programme shall be given preference. The candidates should have a valid two wheelers driving license.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 Years Maximum Age: 40 Years Age Relaxation: ST: 40 years (50 years for PwD); Ex-Servicemen: 5 years relaxation in respective category

content_sections.heading: DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Merit List based on Written Test and Educational Qualifications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://lohardaga.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Lohardaga Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Lohardaga MTS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC post is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC post is 21 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the MTS position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Malaria Technical Supervisor (MTS) - NCVBDC position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the MTS role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates, preferably from a biology stream. Graduates with Science in Class XII will be considered if no suitable candidates with the preferred qualification are available.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Malaria Technical Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 24,036 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General and PwBD candidates. However, SC/ST candidates are required to pay Rs. 200.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test and a Merit List based on the Written Test and Educational Qualifications.

faq.question: Q9. Does DHS Lohardaga offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. ST candidates can avail relaxation up to 50 years, and Ex-Servicemen get a 5-year relaxation in their respective categories.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Lohardaga District: https://lohardaga.nic.in/.
